title: Cert Certificate Issued Event
description: Emitted when a certificate is officially issued in the verification system.

metadata.description: Event metadata conforming to D2-2 Event Metadata Standard (10-field fixed template).

event_id.description: Globally unique identifier for the event instance.

version.description: Semantic version of the event schema.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the event was produced.

source.description: Origin system or service that produced the event.

producer.description: Specific component or service instance that produced the event.

correlation_id.description: Identifier used to correlate related events across multiple systems.

causation_id.description: Identifier of the event that caused this event (e.g., the parent command).

tenant_id.description: Tenant or organization namespace the event belongs to.

user_id.description: Identifier of the user who triggered the event.

cert_id.description: Unique identifier of the certificate record in the system.

cert_no.description: Official certificate number assigned by the certification body.

cert_type.description: Type of certification (e.g., CB, CCC, UL, CE, SASO, etc.).

issue_date.description: ISO 8601 date when the certificate was issued.

expiry_date.description: ISO 8601 date when the certificate expires.

certified_body.description: Name or identifier of the certification body that issued the certificate.

product_model.description: Model name or number of the certified product.

status.description: Status of the certificate (e.g., active, suspended, expired).

issuing_country.description: Country where the certificate was issued.

scope.description: Scope or coverage description of the certificate.

issued_by.description: Identifier of the user or system that issued the certificate.
